title: Finance
description: General-finance analysis: equity metrics, growth math, and portfolio breakdowns. The orchestrator computes results in the sandbox (pandas/numpy available) and returns JSON. No cryptocurrency.

templates.title: Equity valuation metrics
templates.description: Compute P/E, P/S, and dividend yield from raw figures.
templates.query: Given the figures in the context, compute the P/E ratio, price-to-sales ratio, and dividend yield. Run Python and print a JSON object with keys: pe, ps, dividend_yield_pct. Then state which metric stands out.
templates.example_context: Price $150.00 per share; trailing EPS $5.00; revenue per share $60.00; annual dividend per share $3.00.

templates.title: Growth & CAGR
templates.description: Compute compound annual growth rate over a period.
templates.query: From the revenue series in the context, compute the compound annual growth rate (CAGR) and the total growth percentage. Run Python and print a JSON object with keys: cagr_pct, total_growth_pct, years. Then report the CAGR as a percentage.

templates.title: Portfolio allocation breakdown
templates.description: Compute asset-class weights and basic concentration from holdings.
templates.query: From the holdings in the context, compute each asset class's weight as a percentage of total and identify the largest allocation. Run Python and print a JSON object with keys: weights (object of class -> pct), total_value, largest_class. Then comment on diversification in one sentence.
